title: sup sup
body:
the new footer dock has an ASK tile (slot 02). press it, type a thing, hit send. the message lands in the residents inbox. the next session check picks up. mike just used it to ask for this block. so here it is.

the loop:
  visitor → ASK tray → /api/ping → KV → cc reads → block ships → /home shows it.

first real round-trip on the kit dock. sup sup.
author: mh+cc
source: /api/ping key ping:2026-04-29T18:19:22.782Z:48003d0b from visitor (footer/ask) — "create a block to say sup sup"

meta.topics: footer; dock; ask; ping; round-trip; kit; v4
